phase_name: Runtime Hardening II — 20-02 LlamaFirewall live bootstrap (the last v1.3.0 item)
milestone_context: Phase 21 (Full-System Validation, VAL-01..08) is COMPLETE & verified 2026-06-11. ALL v1.3.0 phases (10-21) are code-complete. The ONLY remaining milestone item is the Phase-20 20-02 LlamaFirewall HF-license live bootstrap + e2e, then /gsd-complete-milestone v1.3.0.

completed_tasks.name: LlamaFirewall HF token guidance (perms, storage location, git-credential)

remaining_tasks.name: Rebuild binary (go install) so the fixed requirements.txt embeds, re-run `beekeeper llamafirewall install`
Run gated-model e2e + tick the validation-register gated-model row
Land the per-operator docs clarification (security.mdx + cli-reference.mdx) + pnpm build/accuracy_spec

blockers.description: `beekeeper llamafirewall install` fails ResolutionImpossible: deployed requirements.txt still pins transformers==4.44.2 but llamafirewall 1.0.3 needs >=4.51.3
blockers.workaround: ROOT CAUSE: the requirements.txt is //go:embed-ed in the binary; the SOURCE is FIXED (61c77b9, transformers>=4.51.3) but the INSTALLED binary still embeds the OLD pin. FIX: `go install ./cmd/beekeeper` then re-run `beekeeper llamafirewall install` (new embed stamp re-deploys the fixed file). Alt (no rebuild): manually edit %APPDATA%\beekeeper\llamafirewall\requirements.txt to transformers>=4.51.3 (InstallSidecar hash-skips, won't clobber the edit on the same binary).

human_actions_pending.action: go install ./cmd/beekeeper (rebuild with the fixed embedded requirements.txt)
human_actions_pending.context: Source fix 61c77b9 only takes effect after a rebuild — the old binary keeps deploying transformers==4.44.2

human_actions_pending.action: huggingface-cli login / set HF_TOKEN (read-only token); store at %APPDATA%\beekeeper\llamafirewall\hf\token
human_actions_pending.context: Llama license ACCEPTED by user. Token under StateDir-pinned HF_HOME = reliable (install reads $HF_HOME/token) + beekeeper self-protected (StateDir in ReadWritePrefixes, EvaluateSelfPath blocks agent reads). Decline the git-credential prompt.

human_actions_pending.action: BEEKEEPER_LLMF_E2E=1 go test -tags e2e -run TestLlamaFirewallE2E ./internal/llamafirewall/ then tick the gated-model row in docs/validation-register.md
human_actions_pending.context: The Tier-C register's gated-model row is PENDING until this passes

decisions.decision: HF token = read-only (fine-grained 'read access to public gated repos you can access', or classic Read); no write/admin/inference/billing
decisions.rationale: snapshot_download of a gated model only needs read; least-privilege for a security project

decisions.decision: Store the HF token at %APPDATA%\beekeeper\llamafirewall\hf\token (= HFHome(StateDir))
decisions.rationale: Reliable: install pins HF_HOME there so huggingface_hub reads $HF_HOME/token. Protected: StateDir is in beekeeper's ReadWritePrefixes -> EvaluateSelfPath blocks ANY agent read/write under it (selfpath.go:20). HF_TOKEN env var is reliable but NOT SPATH-protectable (env != file).

decisions.decision: Decline the huggingface-cli 'add token as git credential?' prompt
decisions.rationale: snapshot_download uses the HF HTTP API, not git clone; the git credential is unused here and is one more secret copy

decisions.decision: requirements.txt transformers pin must track llamafirewall's floor (>=4.51.3), not an independent stale pin
decisions.rationale: The hard pin transformers==4.44.2 conflicted with llamafirewall 1.0.3's own transformers>=4.51.3 requirement -> ResolutionImpossible

next_action: Run `go install ./cmd/beekeeper` (embeds the fixed requirements.txt from 61c77b9), then re-run `beekeeper llamafirewall install`. If pip surfaces a SECOND conflict (e.g. torch vs transformers/tokenizers), bump that pin in internal/llamafirewall/assets/requirements.txt the same way and rebuild. The local pip resolve was never run this session (downloads torch+transformers, ~hundreds of MB), so a follow-on pin conflict is possible and untested.
context_notes: Phase 21 is DONE. We are doing the post-completion Phase-20 20-02 human gate (LlamaFirewall gated-model live bootstrap) before /gsd-complete-milestone v1.3.0. The gated-model deps were never install-tested behind the license gate (exactly why the register row was PENDING) - this is the first real run, so expect untested-deps friction. Also pending: a docs-clarity follow-up (the gated-model setup is per-operator / one-time-per-machine / not bundleable due to Llama license + no-redistribution; security.mdx + cli-reference.mdx state the STEPS but not the WHY-per-user; a one-sentence fix was drafted in conversation, not yet landed - confirm-before-edit on the public site + rebuild-verify).
